description: Microsoft Word 2010 is open with 'shortcuts_list.docx', a document containing a long list of about 60 keyboard shortcuts. Currently, it spans 3 pages. Your goal is to reformat this document into a SINGLE-PAGE Quick Reference Guide/Cheat Sheet. Reformat the document to use Landscape orientation, Narrow margins (0.5"), and 3 columns for the shortcut list. The title 'Office 2010 Essential Shortcuts' must remain centered at the top of the page and span across all columns. Adjust font size and spacing as necessary to ensure all content fits on exactly one page. Save the final document as 'reference_guide.docx' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents.
